title: Purpura Skies: Cobblemon Ametrine
description: A cozy little cobblemon+ pack! Come play with us on our server and meet some new friends who share a love for Pokemon.
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/928059199550783548?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=852caa&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2Fbv6EDJEB4R) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ZhKhWpAE?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=ffffff&color=852caa)
### **_PLEASE NOTE YOU MUST INCREASE THE MEMORY ALLOCATED FOR THIS PACK. THE DEFAULT 2 GBS IS NOT ENOUGH._** ## Welcome to Purpura Skies: Cobblemon Ametrine > Embark on a whimsical journey through Purpura Skies: Cobblemon Ametrine, where Minecraft meets Pokémon in adorable harmony. Explore charming beautiful biomes, engaging in playful battles with lovable Pokémon from the Cobblemon mod as you adventure. Enhanced with cozy mods, the experience promises enchantment and delight for all players.
**About Purpura Skies** > Welcome to Purpura Skies, we are a close-knit Minecraft community offering a variety of themed modpacks. From the whimsical adventures of "Cobblemon Ametrine" to the tranquil farm life in "Purpura Skies: Homegrown," our aim is to create a cozy environment where everyone feels welcome. With diverse experiences and a warm atmosphere, there's something here for every player to enjoy. Join us in building friendships and exploring the wonders of Minecraft together.
**Check out our other modpacks:** > [Purpura Skies: Homegrown](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/purpura-skies-homegrown) - Immerse yourself in a peaceful Minecraft farming adventure. Build your dream homestead as you nurture crops, care for adorable animals, and explore charming landscapes. With a focus on community and cozy gameplay, Homegrown offers a tranquil escape where you can unwind, connect with fellow players, and enjoy the simple joys of farm life. **A special thank you to our patrons that made this possible!** > - Sh0resy > - PeridotDaisy > - Roesirus > - AshOfAwesome > - HaighInc > - CaptainMineblox > - TheTwoUnitedStates5031 > - LiverCirrhosis > - Catsity > - NormalNova > - Whitebanshee1 > - Trisuul > - AllisonNichole > - Manablood > - RedstoneTest > - Vondrim > - AliGamer_YT
**Discord**: [https://discord.gg/bv6EDJEB4R](https://discord.gg/bv6EDJEB4R) While most of our mods are hosted on modrinth, we have two that are hosted on CurseForge only. A big thank you to those creators for allowing us to use them in modrinth modpacks! - [Memory Settings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/memory-settings) - [Cupboard]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard))
**Do you need a server?** All of our servers are proudly hosted by MelonCube! If you've been looking for a fantastic host, look no further, just click [here](https://www.meloncube.net/clients/aff.php?aff=1549). ![Proudly hosted by MelonCube](https://www.meloncube.net/uploads/affiliates/mc-hosted.png)
